summary: Completed comprehensive testing of F1 educational website with beginner-first learning experience. Backend APIs working excellently (96% success rate), frontend UI and interactions working perfectly with numbered learning steps, progress tracking, and simplified content structure.

minor_bugs.issue: Brute force protection not triggering 429 status after 5 failed attempts
minor_bugs.impact: Security feature not fully working as expected

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile navigation toggle timeout during testing

passed_tests: Hero section with 6 numbered learning steps
Navigation with step numbers and progress bar
All 6 main sections (What is F1, Race Weekend, Teams, Rules, Strategy, Quick Guide)
What is F1 section with simplified content cards
Teams section with team elements and filter
Strategy section with tyre selection (Soft, Medium, Hard)
Quick Guide section as cheat sheet
Mark as Learned buttons with authentication
Profile page with section progress tracking
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix brute force protection in backend auth to properly return 429 status after 5 failed login attempts. Consider adding consistent data-testid attributes to all navigation buttons for better testability.
